company.name: The Velnix
company.description: We help startups and businesses design, build, launch, and scale software products, AI systems, mobile applications, and digital brands. We operate as a product partner and technical execution team, not a traditional outsourcing agency.

services.title: SaaS Development
services.shortDescription: Full-stack multi-tenant web products built to scale.
services.longDescription: We design and build complete software-as-a-service applications. From database architecture and multi-tenant isolation to billing flows, user authentication, and responsive dashboards, we write clean, type-safe codebases designed to handle high concurrency.
benefits: Faster time-to-market with proven boilerplates
Clean, decoupled frontend and backend architectures
Secure user data partitioning and access control
Seamless subscription billing integration
deliverables: Production-ready Next.js / TypeScript repository
Multi-tenant database schema (PostgreSQL)
Stripe integration for subscription management
Automated unit and integration test suites
services.idealClient: SaaS founders needing a robust MVP or scaling an existing web application.

services.title: AI Agents
services.shortDescription: Intelligent agentic workflows automating complex business operations.
services.longDescription: We build custom AI agents that go beyond simple chatbot interfaces. We integrate large language models with tool-calling capabilities, vector databases, and memory systems to execute multi-step workflows, process raw data, and automate technical decisions.
benefits: Reduction in operational overhead for repetitive tasks
High-accuracy retrieval using advanced RAG setups
Autonomous agents capable of interacting with external APIs
Deterministic fallbacks for safety and compliance
deliverables: AI agent workflow engine and API endpoints
Vector database indexing pipeline (Supabase / PGVector)
Prompt engineering and model evaluation logs
Admin monitoring dashboard for agent execution traces
services.idealClient: Product teams looking to automate internal operations or embed agentic workflows into their products.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.shortDescription: High-performance cross-platform iOS and Android apps.
services.longDescription: We build fast, responsive mobile applications using Flutter and React Native. We focus on offline-first sync engine configurations, native module integrations, fluid animations, and clean layouts that work seamlessly across viewports.
benefits: Single codebase efficiency with native-grade performance
Robust offline caching and local database synchronization
Fast release pipelines and App Store/Google Play publishing
Smooth micro-interactions and animations
deliverables: Cross-platform Flutter / React Native source code
App Store and Google Play console setup and deployment
Offline-first synchronization layer
Push notification system integration
services.idealClient: Startups requiring high-fidelity mobile experiences delivered on short timelines.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.shortDescription: Interface design systems bridging the gap between design and code.
services.longDescription: We design product interfaces focusing on user flows, interaction logic, visual hierarchy, and developer handoff. We build comprehensive, tokenized design systems in Figma that match your production codebase components, eliminating design-to-engineering friction.
benefits: Intuitive user flows that lower user friction
Design tokens (colors, spacing, typography) mapped directly to code
High-fidelity interactive Figma prototypes
Complete design system coverage for all edge states
deliverables: Interactive Figma workspace files
Design tokens JSON export for frontend integration
Responsive layout wireframes and user flow maps
Component-based UI design library
services.idealClient: Founders who need a clean, premium visual direction and structured layouts before coding starts.

services.title: Branding
services.shortDescription: Technical, premium, and minimal visual identities for digital products.
services.longDescription: We define how your product looks and feels. We build minimal, premium, and engineering-forward brand identities, covering logo designs, curated color systems, custom typography, asset libraries, and digital guidelines that position you as an industry leader.
benefits: Cohesive visual narrative across web, app, and docs
Clean, premium brand positioning that builds trust
Vector-perfect assets ready for modern layout designs
Clear identity documentation for future scaling
deliverables: Vector logo system (SVG formats)
Brand style guide (color palettes, typography scale)
Custom asset illustrations and social banners
Font package and visual asset inventory
services.idealClient: Startups and technical companies looking to establish a highly professional, developer-friendly brand presence.

services.title: DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure
services.shortDescription: Automated, scalable, and secure multi-cloud architectures.
services.longDescription: We architect and deploy cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC). We set up automated CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, log routing, metrics collectors, and multi-region failover setups that ensure your application runs with 99.9% uptime.
benefits: Zero-downtime rolling deployments
Infrastructure defined entirely in code for easy tracking
Automated scaling based on CPU, memory, or network load
Comprehensive logging and tracing for rapid debugging
deliverables: Terraform configuration files for cloud provisioning
CI/CD workflow YAML configs (GitHub Actions / GitLab)
Dockerized container setup and Kubernetes manifests
Prometheus/Grafana logging and alert dashboards
services.idealClient: Companies scaling past single-server setups that require industrial-grade DevOps management.

services.title: CTO-as-a-Service
services.shortDescription: Strategic technical leadership and system architecture consulting.
services.longDescription: Get fractional CTO access to guide your technical roadmap. We help you make core architectural decisions, design database schemas, evaluate security standards, manage technical debt, hire engineers, and establish high-throughput development workflows.
benefits: Avoid costly architectural mistakes early in development
Clear tech stack vetting aligned with business goals
Structured technical hiring and vetting pipelines
Executive technical representation for investor calls
deliverables: System architecture specification documents
Engineering hiring rubrics and interview templates
Technical roadmap, risk matrix, and dependency graphs
Weekly architectural review sync calls
services.idealClient: Non-technical founders or early-stage startups needing senior engineering leadership without the full-time cost.

services.title: Product Strategy
services.shortDescription: Scoping, roadmap development, and functional feature definition.
services.longDescription: We help you define what to build, what to defer, and how to execute. We translate high-level business goals into a structured technical backlog, defining user stories, feature specs, database entity relations, and step-by-step milestones to keep execution fast.
benefits: Clear backlog priorities that eliminate wasted developer hours
Thoroughly defined milestones that align with launch targets
Deep technical vetting of product feature feasibility
Granular sprint schedules and backlog documentation
deliverables: Product Requirement Documents (PRDs) and specs
Structured backlog roadmap in Jira / Linear
Entity Relationship Diagrams (ERDs) and core user flows
MVP feature prioritization matrix
services.idealClient: Founders wanting a tight, execution-focused product roadmap to guide internal teams or partners.

services.title: Automation Systems
services.shortDescription: Custom scripting, data synchronizers, and automated workflows.
services.longDescription: We eliminate manual operational bottlenecks. We build custom API integrations, scheduled cron synchronizers, webhook routers, scraper engines, and internal dashboard tools that sync data across your CRM, inventory system, and database.
benefits: Elimination of manual data entry errors
Real-time syncing between disparate database systems
Automated reporting and alerting via Slack or Email
Scalable webhook ingestion systems
deliverables: Custom workflow automation repository
Third-party API webhook ingestion router
Scheduled crawler/synchronizer scripts
Automated alerting and telemetry configurations
services.idealClient: SMBs and product teams looking to automate manual workflows and connect siloed software tools.

portfolio.title: InboxFM
portfolio.overview: InboxFM is an AI-native email workspace that transforms cluttered email threads into summaries, actionable tasks, reminders, and audio briefings. It cuts down on email noise by parsing incoming messages and highlighting priority intelligence.
portfolio.problem: Professionals spend hours reading long email chains, manually creating tasks, and missing key updates due to inbox clutter. Traditional email clients treat all incoming messages with equal weight, leading to context overload.
portfolio.solution: We built a clean, modular workspace that connects securely via OAuth, ingests email payloads, and routes them through structured LLM parsing chains. InboxFM automatically generates 3-sentence summaries, extracts action items, schedule alerts, and compiles daily audio summaries using voice synthesis.
keyFeatures: LLM-generated 3-sentence thread summaries
One-click task extraction syncing to productivity tools
Daily text-to-speech audio briefings of priority emails
Semantic filtering that flags critical contract updates or client blockers
portfolio.impact: Users reduced time spent sorting emails by 65% and eliminated missed action items through automated task syncing.

portfolio.title: CodeDog
portfolio.overview: CodeDog is an AI-powered static analysis platform that monitors code repositories in real-time, detects security risks, flags secret leaks, and identifies software vulnerabilities before they reach production.
portfolio.problem: Vulnerabilities and secret tokens are frequently committed to repositories by accident. Standard static analysis tools generate high volumes of false positives, causing developer fatigue and leading teams to ignore critical alerts.
portfolio.solution: We engineered a lightweight repository scanner that hooks into CI/CD pipelines via webhooks. CodeDog parses git diffs, analyzes changed files using custom AST scanners and LLM context mapping, and flags high-confidence risks directly in pull request comments. It won first place at IntelliHack 2025.
keyFeatures: Webhook-triggered git diff parsing
AST-based secret leak detection and code structure mapping
Contextual LLM evaluations that reduce false positive alerts by 85%
Automated inline pull request review comments
portfolio.impact: Identified and blocked 23 critical secret leaks in its first month and reduced false positives to less than 5%.

portfolio.title: VedDB
portfolio.overview: VedDB is a high-performance, in-memory key-value database designed for microsecond-latency caching. Built for speed, it uses a custom binary wire protocol and a lightweight memory allocation structure.
portfolio.problem: Generic in-memory databases introduce high memory overhead and complex configurations. Product teams scaling cache layers need simple, ultra-fast integrations without the bloat of full enterprise database features.
portfolio.solution: We wrote a minimalist in-memory database engine featuring lock-free index structures and a custom TCP network protocol. It provides sub-millisecond lookups, basic transactional support, and easy client SDK configurations.
keyFeatures: Lock-free hash table implementations optimized for multi-core scaling
Minimalist TCP binary protocol that cuts down serialization overhead
Snapshotted persistence configurations for crash recovery
Developer-first client SDKs with zero third-party dependencies
portfolio.impact: Achieved 250,000+ operations per second on standard hardware with memory utilization 40% lower than standard caches.

portfolio.title: Doxify
portfolio.overview: Doxify is an automated technical documentation engine that analyzes your project's codebase structure, parses inline docstrings, and generates clean, up-to-date developer portals automatically.
portfolio.problem: Technical references and setup guides go out of sync with code modifications within weeks. Maintaining manual developer documentation wastes precious hours and leads to outdated READMEs.
portfolio.solution: We developed a CLI tool that parses code Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs). Doxify maps functions, types, and endpoints, extracting docstrings and generating structured Markdown guides. It automatically updates documentation inside GitHub actions whenever changes are pushed.
keyFeatures: Multi-language AST parsing (TypeScript, Go, Python)
Automated API endpoint reference mapping
GitHub Actions integration for auto-updating documentation
Sleek static documentation site generator templates
portfolio.impact: Saved engineering teams an average of 4 hours per developer per week, keeping documentation 100% in sync.

portfolio.title: FakePE
portfolio.overview: FakePE is a payment gateway simulation platform. It replicates production payment processor API payloads, transaction workflows, and webhooks, allowing developers to test billing logic in offline sandboxes.
portfolio.problem: Integrating and testing edge states (like card declines, chargebacks, and network timeouts) in sandbox environments of real payment processors is slow, unreliable, and requires active internet connections.
portfolio.solution: We created a mock payment server replicating major gateway APIs (Stripe, Braintree, Razorpay). It supports webhook routing, simulates payment statuses via query params, and operates completely locally on a developer's machine.
keyFeatures: 1-to-1 API schema matching with leading payment gateways
Custom status triggers via HTTP header overrides
Robust offline-ready Docker image local deployments
Webhook delivery simulator showing retry queues
portfolio.impact: Reduced billing integration bug rates by 70% and enabled zero-connectivity billing testing.

portfolio.title: ScholarFlex
portfolio.overview: ScholarFlex is a student productivity and internship management platform. It streamlines internship tracking, progress logging, university approvals, and employer evaluations.
portfolio.problem: University internship tracking is managed through spreadsheets, emails, and paper forms. Students, advisors, and employers struggle with fragmented communication, leading to delayed approvals and graduation blocks.
portfolio.solution: We designed and built a portal bringing students, advisors, and corporate employers into a single workspace. ScholarFlex logs hours, hosts evaluations, and automates approval routing based on custom university policies.
keyFeatures: Milestone-based student internship logs
Automated approval chain routing for advisors
Employer assessment forms and grading panels
Secure document uploads for verification
portfolio.impact: Adopted by 3 large educational institutions, reducing internship processing times from weeks to 2 days.

portfolio.title: AI Species Detection
portfolio.overview: AI Species Detection is a computer vision platform designed for wildlife conservation. It automatically identifies and classifies animal species from camera trap images deployed in remote habitats.
portfolio.problem: Analyzing millions of camera trap images manually is tedious, slow, and delays ecological conservation efforts by months. Conservationists need fast, accurate classification systems that run on low-power devices.
portfolio.solution: We optimized a YOLOv8 computer vision model trained on custom wildlife datasets. We deployed this model to edge devices, building a dashboard that processes image batches, flags target species, and maps migration data.
keyFeatures: Custom-trained YOLOv8 bounding box and classification models
Batch image upload pipelines handling 10k+ images
Offline-capable edge inference setup (Raspberry Pi/Jetson Nano)
Geospatial mapping of animal detections
portfolio.impact: Achieved 94.2% classification accuracy, processing image batches 80 times faster than human experts.

portfolio.title: RAG Knowledge Assistant
portfolio.overview: RAG Knowledge Assistant is a semantic document search and QA engine that retrieves company intelligence from PDF specs, Notion wikis, and Slack threads.
portfolio.problem: Company knowledge is fragmented across formats and applications. Internal teams waste hours searching for technical specs, policies, or past decisions, leading to duplicate work and outdated procedures.
portfolio.solution: We engineered a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system. It indexes files, converts text to vector embeddings, stores them in PGVector, and uses LLMs to answer natural language questions with source citations.
keyFeatures: Data ingestion connectors (Notion, Google Drive, Slack)
Chunking optimization and PGVector similarity search
LLM context validation preventing hallucinations
Clear source citation links showing original documents
portfolio.impact: Reduced internal support ticket count by 40% and cut spec lookup times from minutes to seconds.

portfolio.title: BizNest
portfolio.overview: BizNest is a mobile-first operations hub for small retail stores, combining inventory tracking, sales logs, analytics, customer operations, and storefront catalog setups.
portfolio.problem: Small store owners use multiple disconnected tools (paper ledgers, simple POS systems, messaging apps) to manage stock and sell to clients. This leads to stockouts, lost records, and zero metrics visibility.
portfolio.solution: We built a lightweight, fast, offline-first mobile app using Flutter. BizNest helps owners track stock levels, issue digital invoices, analyze sales margins, and host a simple web catalog directly from their phones.
keyFeatures: Offline-first stock registry with instant search
Digital PDF invoicing via WhatsApp or Email
Local and cloud database sync (Supabase)
Sales analytics showing top-performing products
portfolio.impact: Helped 50+ local merchants transition to digital inventory, reducing stock discrepancies by 90%.

hero.headline: We build software products from idea to production.
hero.subheadline: An AI-Native Product & Engineering Studio. We design, code, and deploy SaaS platforms, custom AI systems, and mobile applications with an obsession for speed, design precision, and clean code.

intro.title: We are a team of software systems builders
intro.description: The Velnix is a modern, engineering-first studio. We help ambitious founders and businesses build digital products that scale. We do not operate like a traditional software agency. We don't employ account managers or slide creators. You work directly with the developers and designers building your software.

values.title: Product-Focused Execution
values.description: We treat your project like our own. We focus on building what is necessary for your users to succeed, prioritizing execution and launch speed over everything else.

values.title: Engineering Craftsmanship
values.description: We write clean, type-safe, and scalable code. Our databases are normalized, our API layers are fast, and our deployments are fully automated.

values.title: Trust & Extreme Transparency
values.description: You see working software every week. We share GitHub repositories, Figma workspaces, and Slack channels. No big reveals, no surprises.

values.title: Design Precison
values.description: We build interfaces that look premium and function smoothly. Our designs bridge the gap from Figma tokens to clean web CSS.

intro.title: Join a team of senior builders
intro.description: We are a remote-first team of dedicated engineers and designers obsessed with layout precision, performance, and technical challenge. We don't care about credentials — we care about execution.

perks.description: Work asynchronously with clear goals, minimal meetings, and full ownership of your domain.

perks.title: Modern Tooling
perks.description: Access to state-of-the-art developer tools, top-tier SaaS subscriptions, and clean setups.

perks.title: Professional Growth

intro.title: Built on production-proven technology
intro.description: We select tools based on type safety, community backing, performance under load, and developer speed. Here is what we use to build.

faqs.question: How is The Velnix different from a typical software agency?
faqs.answer: Traditional agencies rely on project managers, account executives, and slides. At The Velnix, you work directly with senior engineers and designers. We do not inflate scopes. We write code, push to GitHub, and deploy weekly.

faqs.question: Who will build my product?
faqs.answer: Your product will be built directly by our core team of specialists: Mihir Rabari (Systems & Infrastructure), Khushi Patel & Aangi Shah (UI/UX & Product Design), Karan Mistry (AI & RAG Systems), Jignesh Prajapati (Mobile Applications), and Khushi Trivedi (Operations & Growth).

faqs.question: What is your development process like?
faqs.answer: We work in agile, bi-weekly sprints. We provide you with access to our GitHub repository, Figma files, and a staging URL where you can test live changes. We communicate daily in a shared Slack channel.

faqs.question: Do you help with database migration or scaling?
faqs.answer: Yes. We design database schemas, configure multi-tenant isolation, optimize query performance, set up connection poolers, and build automated CI/CD pipelines to ensure seamless scaling.
